meaning: n.星系,银河,一群显赫的人,一系列光彩夺目的东西
examples: The Galaxy consists of 100 billion stars.
Astronomers have discovered a distant galaxy.
At least one supernova occurs per decade in our galaxy.
Since 2009, the billion-euro Herschel telescope has been unravelling the complexities of star birth and galaxy evolution.
But later incarnations of the Galaxy lineup have, to some extent, surpassed the iPhone.
